headline: Does Lam Research (LRCX) Have the Right Playbook for AI-Era Tools and Capital Returns?
summary: Earlier this week, Lam Research Corporation confirmed a quarterly dividend of US$0.26 per share payable on July 8, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 17, 2026, reinforcing its ongoing capital-return program alongside strong fiscal third-quarter results and upgraded guidance tied to AI-related semiconductor demand. At the same time, Lam expanded its advanced packaging R&D footprint in Salzburg and intensified efforts to embed sensing and AI capabilities into its tools, underlining how AI...

summary: The artificial intelligence buildout has already sent semiconductor demand sharply higher, and Wall Street is now looking deeper into the supply chain for the next group of companies that could benefit from the spending cycle. headline: Is Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) One of the Best Oversold Growth Stocks to Invest in Now?
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the best oversold growth stocks to invest in now. Morgan Stanley upgraded Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) to Overweight from Equal Weight on May 18, adjusting the price target on the stock to $331 from $293. headline: Impinj, Lam Research, and FormFactor Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after AI chip leader Nvidia reported record sales and income, driven by what its CEO described as 'parabolic' demand for AI infrastructure.
